identity.name: Pasta Privato
identity.address: St. Lawrence / Church St (hidden inside Notte Ristorante, 11 Church St)

narrative.summary: 30-seat hidden pasta speakeasy opening March 27. Chef Michael Angeloni (ex-Amano). 8-course tasting $125 or à la carte. Artisanal pasta, Kaluga caviar tajarin, Iberico agnolotti. Accessed through a door inside Notte. Coolest concept opening this month. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.
